detail.description:
Pre-register for the 4949 Draw! Limited Skins! Various In-game Items!

A terrifyingly lighthearted comic horror exploration RPG, Night Escape - 49 Days!

Late at night on Seoul Subway Line 2, an alternate dimension encroaching upon reality, and endless ghost stories.

While working overtime, you were chosen as the 'Guide'!

Hunt demons and rescue survivors within a 49-day loop to become the strongest 'Guide' in this alternate world!
